title: Combat Crosshair
description: Changes the crosshair in the game
body:
**A detailed and carefully designed resource pack that replaces the default Minecraft crosshair with a Combat Crosshair. This pack is created to improve aiming accuracy, visibility, and overall combat performance. The new crosshair is clean, minimal, and easy to track during fast-paced PvP fights and intense survival gameplay. Perfect for players who want a more tactical and professional combat experience without changing the core vanilla style of Minecraft**

![How the crosshair looks in the game](https://i.imgur.com/ejhZ23i.png)
